narrative:
Miami Township T (precinct in Clermont County) has 993 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.2 percentage points.
